---
name: Adopt a repo
about: Volunteer to co-maintain or adopt one of the Hyperfocus Zone repos
title: "adopt: <repo-name> — @your-gh-username"
labels: ["adopt", "help wanted", "good first issue"]
assignees: []
---

## Who you are
- GitHub handle: `@`
- Timezone / best hours:
- Skills (short list): e.g. Python, TypeScript, DevOps, Docs, Design, Prompt Engineering

## Which repo do you want to adopt?
- Repo name: `<repo-name>`
- Why this repo? (1–2 lines)

## What I can commit to (pick realistic options)
- [ ] I will triage new issues weekly
- [ ] I will respond to PRs within 7 days
- [ ] I will keep CI green and update deps monthly
- [ ] I can help write documentation / onboarding
- [ ] I can mentor new contributors

## Proposed first tasks
1. (e.g.) Add a concise README section explaining the repo purpose.
2. (e.g.) Add 1 small issue labeled `good first issue`.
3. (e.g.) Run tests locally + open a PR fixing a small lint/test error.

## Contact / verification
- Preferred contact method (Discord / Email / GH discussions):
- Please add a short sentence that lets me know you understand the project and the expectations.

---

Thanks — leaving the repo in caring hands keeps the Zone alive.
